_metadata.description: Screening thresholds for advisory pathway eligibility checks
_metadata.disclaimer: Screening thresholds only. Not binding entitlement determinations.

toc.notes: TOC may conflict with specific plans. Specific plan conflicts generate review issues.

density_bonus.description: State Density Bonus Law sliding scales

concessions.notes: Number of concessions depends on affordable set-aside percentage.

sb92_commercial_far_cap.description: SB 92 caps commercial FAR in density bonus projects
sb92_commercial_far_cap.notes: Applies to applications filed on or after 1/1/2026. Advisory flag only.

ab1287_stacking.description: AB 1287 allows stacking state DB with local incentives
ab1287_stacking.notes: Advisory screening note. Eligibility depends on project specifics.

requirements.transit_proximity: Within 0.5 mile of major transit stop
requirements.notes: Potential unlimited density + height + concessions. Requires VMT and transit verification.

sb423.notes: Eligibility depends on HCD housing element compliance determination. Do not hard-code city compliance status.
sb423.check: Point to HCD determination status for current jurisdiction.

ab2011.notes: Applicable if site fronts commercial corridor with qualifying zoning. Advisory screen only.
